steps.t: Sini is on the outskirts of Sûri-kylä. Lassi instructed you to speak with Sini about tasks with which to gain the favour of Yrjänä.
Urmas was last seen heading south towards Itä-mâ. Sini has instructed you to go into the wild to find Urmas.
Sini is on the outskirts of Sûri-kylä. You have found Urmas and should now return to Sini to report your success.
